title: About
text: This is where your bio will go.

title: Brady Rippon
text: I am a biostatistician and software engineer with interests in clinical analysis tools, statistical programming, and data visualization. I am an enthusiastic R and SAS user and love thinking of ways to make research more transparent and approachable.

title: Brady Rippon
text:
What I’m working on


R Packages
Reusable tools for project scaffolding, reporting templates, and reproducible workflows.


Research
Projects focused on clinical research, emergency preparedness, and health systems analysis.


Reports & Dashboards
Quarto, R Markdown, Shiny, and automated reporting workflows.

title: Brady Rippon
text:

Reproducible reporting tools in R

R package development
